title: genista tridentata subsp. cantabrica
intro: Genista tridentata subsp. cantabrica, also known as Spanish broom, is a shrub species native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Genista tridentata subsp. cantabrica include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health issues, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
